% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees
| FORK (WHERE emp_no IN (FROM employees | WHERE salary > 74000 | KEEP emp_no) | KEEP emp_no, salary)
       (WHERE emp_no IN (FROM employees | WHERE salary < 30000 | KEEP emp_no) | KEEP emp_no, salary)
| SORT emp_no, _fork
| KEEP emp_no, salary, _fork
| LIMIT 5
```

| emp_no:integer | salary:integer | _fork:keyword |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 10007 | 74572 | fork1 |
| 10015 | 25324 | fork2 |
| 10026 | 28336 | fork2 |
| 10029 | 74999 | fork1 |
| 10035 | 25945 | fork2 |
